Author: Miu-B
Name: PullToOBS
Punchline: Automated OBS recording manager for FFXIV encounters.
Description: A Dalamud plugin that automatically controls OBS recording during FFXIV encounters. Captures 30-second replay buffer before pulls and full encounter recordings. Requires OBS WebSocket v5 and IINACT. Use /pulltoobs or /pto to configure.
